creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220015
graphics/drm-{devel,current}-kmod update firmware dependency diff

graphics/drm-{devel,current}-kmod update firmware dependency

Once PR 251415 is committed switch to the new "-head" firmware package for
FreeBSD HEAD.  This will allow us to use a direct passthrough (as in no
linker-magic) to firmware(9) from the to be committed LinuxKPI comapt code.

Submitted by: bz
Sponsored by: The FreeBSD Foundation


This PR is mostly to track things and not to lose bits of my local modifications.
